birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Pterorhinus waddelli |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22716512A247824820 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22716512A247824820.en |access-date=17 February 2025}} | taxon = Pterorhinus waddelli | authority = (Dresser, 1905) | synonyms = Ianthocincla waddelliBabax waddelli }} The giant babax (Pterorhinus waddelli) is a species of bird in the laughingthrush family Leiothrichidae, found in northeast India and southern Tibet
